SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF MARIA VELCHES IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARLON VASQUEZ. DEFENDANT SOPHIA DOMINIQUE BROWN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY VILCHES, MARIA
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST (LESS THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILCHES, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, SOPHIA DOMINIQUE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $124.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $624.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SOPHIA DOMINIQUE BROWN SET FOR AUG-12-2019 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA VILCHES IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY REPRESENTATIVE MERCURY INSURANCE, MELISSA RAFFALOW, WHO STATED THAT SHE IS AN ATTORNEY BEFORE THE MATTER IS CALLED, IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. THE COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER TO ALLOW FOR ANOTHER REPRESENTATIVE FROM MERCURY INSURANCE WHO IS NOT AN ATTORNEY, TO BE PRESENT TO REPRESENT THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILCHES, MARIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $124.00 SERVED MAY-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, SOPHIA DOMINIQUE

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SOPHIA DOMINIQUE BROWN ON SEP-17-2019 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF MARIA VILCHES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOPHIA DOMINQUE BROWN, REPRESENTED BY SOVETH SOUS, REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE CARRIER, MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT'S CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF'S ACTION WAS NOT FILED TIMELY AND IS PAST THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS NOT VALID. PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT STANDS. NO NEW EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
